comments.author: @Mostyxes
comments.text: Documentary about Ester Island. British National Geographic has long made a documentary about this uninhabited island and the stone head miracle that no one knows who made it. Now this island is inhabited and there is a culture that is imitated or made for non-original inhabitants. The mystery of this island has been uncovered by the British from the very beginning. Now it is inhabited and some dare to claim it as theirs even though they are new. I advise history and recordings about it. This is clearer from National Geographic. The inhabitants of this island were not there before, they just entered and settled here with a culture imitated from the art of construction.
